skills.name: mollie-integration
skills.description: Guides Mollie payment integration decisions — embedding card fields with Mollie Components (Mollie.js), hosted checkout, webhook handling, payment status flows, 3D Secure, Mollie Connect, recurring payments and mandates, and SDK selection. Use when building, modifying, or reviewing any Mollie integration — including accepting payments, integrating Mollie in a web app or mobile app, setting up a checkout form, handling redirects, verifying webhooks, tokenising card data, or using the Mollie API.
